title: Porkier Piglins
description: Improves the models, and textures of Piglins, Piglin Brutes, and Zombified Piglins as well as adding biome dependent and random variants
body:
Porkier Piglins adds biome dependent variants to all Piglins, including biome dependent skin colours, and foliage
that can be enabled with two addon packs The Piglin Pigments Addon, and The Foliage Addon
Mobs affected by this pack: Piglins, Piglin Brutes, Zombified Piglins. For any further information look in the images tab, instructions on how to obtain the add-on packs will be found there.
#
Variants
- 14 Piglins in each Biome
- 3 Piglin Brutes in each Biome
- 14 Zombified Piglins in each Biome
- 6 Namable Variants
- 1 Secret Variant

All Named Variants
- "Soul Trader"
- "Witch"
- "Gourd"
- "Butch"
- "Jason"
- "Goo"


#
- Made By: creepermax123 & A Platinum Block
- Concept Art By: Molly_Rocks
#
# **REQUIRES OPTIFINE! or EMF + ETF**
To make sure the pack works go to
Options>Video Settings>Quality
and make sure these are on
#
- Custom Entity Models: On
- Emissive Textures: On
- Random Entities: On
